title: Lightning Preimage Credential
description: Cryptographic proof of Lightning Network payment shared across all com.musqet.* profiles. The preimage is the pre-image of payment_hash under SHA-256; the Business recomputes payment_hash and looks up the invoice in its own index to verify.

preimage.description: 64-character lowercase hex-encoded 32-byte preimage revealed during HTLC settlement. Implementations MUST normalise to lowercase before comparison.

checkout_id.description: UCP checkout session identifier. Carried in-credential so binding data is covered by checkout integrity, not transport headers.
